name: Your Name
headline: Your Professional Headline (e.g., AI Product Engineer, Senior Frontend Architect)
summary: Describe the main problems you solve, the business value you create, and the high-impact work you want to do. Keep it objective, factual, and free of vague adjectives.

experience.summary: Explain your core responsibilities, team structures, and the broader business context in which you operated.
evidence: Designed and deployed a repeatable automation workflow reducing cycles by 40%
Coordinated across 4 stakeholders to deliver a production-ready MVP on schedule

projects.name: Example Product
projects.description: A concise explanation of the problem you solved, your specific architectural choices, and your exact boundaries of contribution.
